summary: Chapter 22 craft enforcement audit COMPLETED. All 16 active craft tools verified against chapter draft. Result: 100% compliance. No violations. Chapter is ready for beta reading and polish phases.

findings.t5_tone_contract: PASS — Morally complex, emotionally restrained, earned hope without sentimentality. No melodrama or triumphalism.
findings.t6_stakes_escalation: PASS — Deliberate decompression at 4/10 tension. Identity and choice stakes elevated despite reduced external threat.
findings.t7_black_moment_payoff: PASS — Love proven real through daily choice. HFN earned through devastation of Black Moment.
findings.t8_internal_external_resistance: PASS — Lirien's mission-defined identity and Kaelith's institutional wound both resolved. External pressure cleared.
findings.t10_sandersons_laws: PASS — Magic system rules established before resolution. Oathbrand, Quietus, Pallor all follow established logic. Permanent cost written (silver fingers).
findings.t12_dual_arc_interleave: PASS — Fantasy resolution enables romance resolution. Arcs close together with causal link, not parallel.
findings.t13_tension_mapping: PASS — Chapter tension 4/10 as specified. Micro-tension sustains through identity questions despite low external threat.
findings.t15_foreshadowing_payoff: PASS — FS-013 (Ashborne support), FS-014 (freeholder model), FS-017 (water imagery) all explicit in prose.
findings.t16_symbolic_motif_weaving: PASS — MOT-001 (Pallor) evolved, MOT-002 (Oathbrand) resolved through absence, MOT-003 (water) full arc completion, MOT-004 (Quietus) referenced through embodied knowledge.
findings.t17_voice_fingerprinting: PASS — Lirien POV voice unmistakable. Classification systems, water metaphors, analytical precision consistent throughout.
findings.t18_information_asymmetry: PASS — Resolved state achieved. Both women possess full knowledge. No secrets remain between protagonists.
findings.t20_emotional_throughline: PASS — Lirien emotional arc (unclassified → chosen love) and Kaelith arc (load-bearing peace → active choice) both complete and earned.
findings.t21_vulnerability_ladder: PASS — Final rung reached. Both women fully exposed, fully known, fully choosing. Full knowledge accompanies full vulnerability.
findings.t23_mystery_box_inventory: PASS — MB-014 and MB-015 both closed completely. No new major boxes introduced.
findings.t24_subtext_in_dialogue: PASS — Practical planning surfaces love language. Political statements conceal romantic commitment. Final exchange moves beyond subtext.
findings.t25_thematic_argument_scaffolding: PASS — TP-1 (trust architecture proven), TP-2 (price of right choice), TP-3 (chosen vs only) all resolved through action, not statement.

scn_62.summary: Scene executes emotional reset. Lirien processes binding dissolution, changed world, unclassified emotion. Identity questions sustain micro-tension despite low external threat. Pallor motif evolved to translucent stage. Bond hum established as clean signal.

scn_63.summary: Scene delivers institutional resistance resolution and thematic argument (TP-2). Kaelith recognizes she no longer needs vindication. Lirien's observation captures character growth. Subtext carries romantic commitment beneath political statement.

scn_64.summary: Final scene delivers Black Moment payoff, final vulnerability rung, mystery box closure, and all three thematic resolutions. Water motif resolves. Chapter closing technique (earned-hope) executes flawlessly with small, specific, human image.

recommendations: No corrections needed. Chapter demonstrates exemplary craft discipline.
Ready for immediate advancement to beta reading phase.
